description: Create a CodeQL GitHub Actions workflow that analyzes code on push to master and 1.* branches, on pull requests to those branches, on a weekly schedule, and on workflow dispatch. Run a single analyze job on ubuntu-latest or macos-latest depending on language, with read permissions for actions, contents, and write for security events. The job should check out the repository, initialize CodeQL for cpp language, install the latest CMake, install dependencies, build with CMake, and perform CodeQL analysis.
